vocab.meaning: phần thiết yếu, không thể tách rời
vocab.example: Carrying a laptop and several chargers is part and parcel of my morning routine as a digital nomad.
I prefer to travel light in the evening, usually just taking my phone and house keys to a dinner party.

vocab.meaning: những đồ vật nhỏ, linh tinh
vocab.example: While my morning bag is strictly for work, my evening pockets are often filled with various odds and ends like receipts or mints.

vocab.meaning: ăn mặc sang trọng, lộng lẫy (khi mang đồ phù hợp)
vocab.example: When I'm dressed to the nines for a night out, a bulky backpack is out of the question; I only carry a sleek clutch.

vocab.meaning: chịu đựng gánh nặng (áp lực/trọng lượng) chính
vocab.example: My shoulders usually bear the brunt of my heavy gear in the morning, whereas in the evening, I feel much more liberated.

vocab.meaning: ngăn chặn điều gì khó chịu (như mang dù để tránh mưa)
vocab.example: In the morning, I always pack an umbrella to keep the unpredictable weather at bay during my commute.

vocab.meaning: một sự khác biệt trời vực
vocab.example: There is a world of difference between the heavy equipment I lug around at 8 AM and the tiny purse I carry at 8 PM.

vocab.meaning: ở nơi an toàn (cách cất đồ đạc)
vocab.example: I carry a specialized padded case in the morning to keep my fragile electronics out of harm's way on the crowded subway.
I make sure all my work documents are at my fingertips in my morning bag, but in the evening, I leave the paperwork behind.

vocab.meaning: những công cụ cần thiết để làm việc
vocab.example: My morning tote is essentially filled with the tools of the trade, whereas my evening bag is strictly for leisure.
